title: AN ACT RE-ESTABLISHING THE COTABATO CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 6262 / 97 OG No. 12, 17 Supp. (Mar. 19, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8906, August 22, 2000 ]

AN ACT RE-ESTABLISHING THE COTABATO CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There is hereby re-established the Cotabato City National High School in Cotabato City.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 3. This law shall take effect immediately upon approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M.

DRILON

(Sgd.) MANUEL B. VILLAR JR.

President of the

Senate

Speaker of the House of

Representatives

This

Act

which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August 17, 1999

and May 22, 2000, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G.

YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P.

NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of

Representatives

Approved:

August

22, 2000

(Sgd.) JOSEPH E.

ESTRADA

President of the Philippines
